Sage Bot Item Code: A141
Emerald Heart Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Protective Barrier
The unit grants each ally a magic shield. The shield absorbs 500000 damage and lasts for up to 6 sec. When the shield wears off, it explodes and deals 250000 magic damage to a random enemy. The ally who had that shield restores 225000 health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
